name: FlowerRock
short_description: FlowerRock is a 2D platformer for players who love intense boss fights and an mysterious story. Something happened to this world, powerful enemies and secrets litter the landscape. Unlock upgrades for your laser to blast stronger enemies and unravel the story of what happened to this forsaken world.
detailed_description:
FlowerRock is a 2D platformer for players who love intense boss fights and an mysterious story. Something happened to this world, powerful enemies and secrets litter the landscape. Unlock upgrades for your laser to blast stronger enemies and unravel the story of what happened to this forsaken world.

You can't recognize anything around you, but these characters, these walls... it all seems so familiar. Who- no... What are you? Can you fight your way out and discover your purpose?
about_the_game:
FlowerRock is a 2D platformer for players who love intense boss fights and an mysterious story. Something happened to this world, powerful enemies and secrets litter the landscape. Unlock upgrades for your laser to blast stronger enemies and unravel the story of what happened to this forsaken world.

You can't recognize anything around you, but these characters, these walls... it all seems so familiar. Who- no... What are you? Can you fight your way out and discover your purpose?
